fixes_verified_c117_c124: C117 — clearGLBCache() called at top of dispose() before geometry.dispose() traversal (MerlinLairScene.ts:1115)
C117 — ResizeObserver wraps container (not window) with typeof guard + window.resize fallback (lines 727-733)
C118 — crystalGLBBaseY = group.position.y set in onCrystalGroupLoaded callback (line 810), not hardcoded
C118 — crystalEntry cached at init with Array.find once (line 838), used on every update frame (line 1066)
C119 — instanceof MeshStandardMaterial guard in applyHoverTo() before emissive write (line 862)
C119 — cursor reset to 'default' BEFORE renderer.domElement.removeChild in dispose() (line 1150)
C120 — instanceof guard in fadeInGLB() traversal — skips non-MeshStandardMaterial meshes (LairGLBAssets.ts:26)
C120 — instanceof guard in applyFlatShading() — same pattern (LairGLBAssets.ts:61)
C121 — doorFlashing guard in pointer path (onPointerAction, line 938): if (doorFlashing) return
C121 — doorFlashing guard in keyboard path (onKeyDown, line 994): if (doorFlashing) return
C121 — onMapGLBLoaded swaps map interactives entry.mesh + entry.visualMesh to GLB mesh (lines 814-817)
C122 — onShelfGLBLoaded mirrors onMapGLBLoaded pattern for bookshelf (lines 819-822)
C122 — raycastTargets cached array refreshed in both onMapGLBLoaded and onShelfGLBLoaded callbacks
C123 — mg_echo.ts totalRounds set via tieredValue([6,6,7,8]) in setup() (mg_echo.ts:80)
C123 — fadeInGLB isDisposed parameter: rAF tick checks isDisposed?.() before writing materials (LairGLBAssets.ts:36)

score_rationale.1_flat_shading_coherence: All procedural geometry uses flatShading:true. applyFlatShading() enforced on every GLB (cauldron, bougie, table_druidique, bibliotheque, sol_pierre, mur_pierre). crystal_ball.glb intentionally omits applyFlatShading (smooth glass effect valid). instanceof guards prevent silent failure on MeshBasicMaterial. -0.5: bougie GLB clones are flat-shaded but candle body particle Points use PointsMaterial (not MeshStandard) — expected, no penalty. Score 9.5.
score_rationale.2_z_fighting_residual: sol_pierre.glb: polygonOffset factor=-2 units=-4 applied at line 200-203 matches mur_pierre pattern. mur_pierre InstancedMesh: polygonOffsetFactor=-2 units=-4 on tileMat (line 225-228). table_druidique positioned Y=-5.0 vs procedural floor Y=-5 — 0.0 delta is marginal but polygonOffset on sol_pierre covers it. -0.8: crystal hitSphere (r=0.85) larger than visual sphere (r=0.70) so no coplanar overlap. Residual risk: bibliotheque.glb scale.set(1.2,1.0,0.8) non-uniform — back face may clip mur_pierre tile at z=-8 on right wall. No polygonOffset on bibliotheque mesh observed. Score 9.2.
score_rationale.3_materiaux_qualite: Cauldron GLB: clone() before mutation (C81-04). Each bougie clone gets own material. Crystal GLB: emissive 0x6030aa set to match procedural baseline. Candle bodies use candleBaseMat.clone() (independent per candle). Pool of 6 book materials (C87). No vertex color usage confirmed in code (GLTF export vertex-colored for sol_pierre per comment — code relies on Blender bake, cannot verify without runtime). -1.0 for unverifiable vertex color integrity on sol_pierre/mur_pierre at static analysis. Score 9.0.
score_rationale.4_lighting_dramaturgie: 5-source lighting: AmbientLight (dark warm 0x1a1008), key PointLight (0xff6618 forward-angled at [0,3,2] — C85-02 fix), rim (0x6699cc cool from door side), fill (warm left 0xcc8833), backAccent (0xff5500 ember rear — skipped on low-end). Cauldron glow 0x22cc44 + candle sharedLight 0xff9933. Door light 0xffdd66. Crystal pulse 0x9060cc. Fog (0x0d0a08, near=12, far=28). Camera sway adds micro-parallax life. LairWindow seasonal cycle adds dynamic exterior light bleed. -0.7: no shadow casting enabled on lights (castShadow not set on PointLights — intentional for perf, but reduces dramaturgy depth vs AAA bar). Score 9.3.
score_rationale.5_GLB_coverage: 5 zones confirmed with GLB overlays: cauldron_merlin.glb (cauldron), bougie.glb x3 (candles), table_druidique.glb (map), bibliotheque.glb (bookshelf), sol_pierre.glb (floor), mur_pierre.glb (walls as InstancedMesh), crystal_ball.glb (crystal). All 5 interactive zones (map/crystal/bookshelf/door/cauldron) have either GLB or procedural fallback. Door zone is procedural-only by design (wooden door fits procedural). GLBs cover all passive surfaces too. Score 9.5.
score_rationale.6_proportions_geometriques: Room bounds: 24x20x16u. Camera at [0,0.5,7] looking at [0,0,-4] with FOV 62. Crystal pedestal at [5,-2,-4], sphere at [5,-1,-4] — consistent. Cauldron body at [2,-3.8,-7] with scale 0.72 GLB — visually coherent vs floor at y=-5 (1.2u above floor: reasonable kettle height). Bookshelf at [8,0.5,-8] with GLB non-uniform scale (1.2,1.0,0.8) — depth compressed to 0.8 to fit right wall without clipping. -1.0: bibliotheque non-uniform scale may produce visible squash artifact on depth axis vs uniform procedural frame. Score 9.0.
score_rationale.7_bundle_perf: vite.config.ts manualChunks: three-core=['three'] + minigames=['MinigameRegistry.ts','MinigameBase.ts']. chunkSizeWarningLimit=550 (three.js ~529KB). reportCompressedSize=true. Main chunk 50.65KB gzip (well under 200KB target). -0.8: minigames chunk only lists registry + base, not the 14 mg_*.ts files — they will be split into individual micro-chunks by Rollup since not listed. This negates the 'one cache-friendly chunk' comment at line 24. 14 individual 2-8KB chunks vs 1 ~80KB chunk — extra HTTP/2 overhead minimal but cache invalidation is per-file (good for incremental deploys). Acknowledged tradeoff, not a bug. Score 8.7.
score_rationale.8_memory_leaks: dispose(): lairDisposed flag set first (C81-03). clearGLBCache() before geometry traversal (C117). ResizeObserver.disconnect() or window.resize removal (C117). All event listeners removed (mousemove/click/touchmove/touchstart/touchend/keydown). clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle) (C120). scene.traverse: InstancedMesh full dispose chain, Mesh/Points geometry+material dispose. renderer.dispose(). cursor reset before removeChild (C119). ariaLive and zoneToast removed from DOM. fadeInGLB rAF cancelled via isDisposed() check (C123). -0.6: PointsMaterial for dust/candle particles not explicitly pooled — created once and disposed via scene.traverse, correct. LairWindow internal state cleanup not visible in this read (separate file). Score 9.4.
score_rationale.9_ux_aria: canvas: role=application, aria-label (Celtic immersive), tabindex=0, auto-focus preventScroll. ariaLive: aria-live=polite, aria-atomic=true, visually-hidden CSS. zoneToast: role=status, aria-live=polite, aria-atomic=true (C124). ZONE_ARIA_LABELS: 5 entries all human-readable French. Keyboard nav: Tab/arrows cycle zones, Enter/Space activate. Keyboard mirrors pointer path including lore toast sync. WCAG 2.1 AA intent solid. -0.7: no aria-describedby linking canvas to ariaLive region explicitly — screen readers may not associate them without explicit markup. Score 9.3.
score_rationale.10_hover_feedback: Cursor: 'pointer' on hover enter, 'default' on hover leave + touchend + dispose. Scale: 1.05 on visualMesh on hover, 1.0 on unhover. Emissive: applyHoverTo(0.65) on hover. zoneToast: lbl (zone name, gold) + desc (ZONE_LORE, muted) fades in/out. SFX: 'hover' sound dispatched. keyboard path syncs lore toast. Crystal: hover emissive persists via crystalEntry.hovered check in update loop (0.9 vs 0.5 base). -0.8: map zone shows lore toast before GLB swap (mapHit has no visualMesh initially, baseEmissive=0.15 on scroll mat). Post-GLB-swap, GLB mesh used for both hit+visual. First few seconds may show subdued hover on map if GLB loads slowly. Score 9.2.
score_rationale.11_door_cinematic_race: doorFlashing guard verified in BOTH pointer path (onPointerAction line 938) AND keyboard path (onKeyDown line 994). Both paths: set doorFlashing=true, doorFlashTimer=0, emissiveIntensity=1.2, dispatch magic_reveal SFX, setTimeout 380ms. lairDisposed guard inside setTimeout cb. clearTimeout(doorFlashCancelHandle) in dispose(). C121 comments confirm awareness. No race condition detectable. Score 9.5.
score_rationale.12_celtic_lore_immersion: ZONE_LORE 5 entries: map='Quelle contrée de Bretagne t'appelle ce soir ?' / crystal='Les runes d'ogham murmurent dans la pierre sacrée' / bookshelf='Les chroniques de Merlin gardent mémoire de tes actes' / cauldron='Le chaudron de Cerridwen bouillonne de sagesse ancienne' (Cerridwen — Celtic goddess) / door='Les bois de Brocéliande t'attendent, voyageur' (Brocéliande — sacred forest). Mythology anchors confirmed present. mg_echo tieredValue([6,6,7,8]) — tier 0 easiest 6 rounds (correct). All 14 minigames have tieredValue on primary difficulty parameter. -0.8: mg_course totalRounds=8 is a readonly private const (not tiered) — fixed difficulty regardless of tier. Minor immersion leak (no tier-scaling on round count). Score 9.2.

top3_bugs.title: bibliotheque.glb non-uniform scale may clip mur_pierre right wall tiles — no polygonOffset applied
top3_bugs.fix: Add polygonOffset (factor=-2, units=-4) traversal after applyFlatShading on bibliotheque.glb, matching the sol_pierre pattern at lines 197-205. Also audit bibliotheque Z position vs right wall at x=11.76 to ensure no physical overlap.

top3_bugs.title: vite.config.ts minigames chunk missing 14 mg_*.ts files — all land in per-file micro-chunks despite comment claiming grouped chunk
top3_bugs.fix: Either add all 14 mg_*.ts paths to the minigames array, or remove the misleading comment at line 24. Current behavior produces 14 individual chunks; the comment claims 'one cache-friendly chunk'. Documentation debt, not a runtime bug.

top3_bugs.title: mg_course totalRounds=8 is a hardcoded private const — not scaled via tieredValue unlike all other minigames
top3_bugs.fix: Change totalRounds from readonly const to mutable private and set via this.tieredValue([6,7,8,8]) in setup(), matching the mg_echo C123 pattern. This prevents tier-4 players facing the same 8-round game as tier-1.

false_positives_from_c60_confirmed_not_p: BUG-1 (bundle wildcard): vite.config.ts line 17-25 confirms explicit manualChunks with named arrays — NOT a wildcard
BUG-2 (mg_echo no mid-game score): mg_echo.ts line 177 confirmed statusEl.textContent update
BUG-3 (zoneToast bare labels): ZONE_LORE lines 917-922 confirmed 5 Celtic flavor text entries
